response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has over 15 years of broad software development experience and solid distributed-systems exposure (high-throughput microservices at Sociomantic), but the resume shows no direct experimentation platform work, no A/B testing or feature-flagging systems, and no telemetry or metrics infrastructure experience — all of which are core to this Principal-level role. The candidate's most recent titles are Senior or Staff, without evidence of IC6-caliber scope (owning multi-team initiatives, shaping org-wide engineering strategy), and a current career gap further weakens the profile. The role requires 4+ years of dedicated experimentation experience; nothing in the resume comes close to that signal.
strengths: Hands-on high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Genuinely polyglot: ships in JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, Java, C#, and DLang, covering most of the role's required language set
Demonstrated AI-agent tooling work (MCP generators, agentic frameworks at re:cinq) aligns with the company's AI-first engineering direction
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume
No evidence of telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or statistical/experimental analysis work required at this seniority
Highest held titles are Senior/Staff, with no demonstrated Principal-level scope: owning cross-team growth strategy, architecture standards, or org-wide measurement systems
